thought.text: 我将查看 git 状态确认 Task2 修改范围。

action.command:
git --no-pager status --short /workspace/YatCC/task/2 /workspace/YatCC/task/1 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
modified files by mtime:
'; find /workspace/YatCC/task/2 -type f -printf '%TY-%Tm-%Td %TH:%TM %p
' | sort | tail -20

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "git --no-pager status --short /workspace/YatCC/task/2 /workspace/YatCC/task/1 2>/dev/null || true; printf '\\nmodified files by mtime:\\n'; find /workspace/YatCC/task/2 -type f -printf '%TY-%Tm-%Td %TH:%TM %p\\n' | sort | tail -20", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Check modified task files"}
